info.title: Melo
info.description:
# Getting started
 ## Authentication
        To get a json web token, you need to authenticate with your credentials :  
        [POST] **https://api.notif.immo/auth**

```
curl --location --request POST 'https://api.notif.immo/auth' \
--header 'Content-Type: application/json' \
--data-raw '{
    "email": "<email>",
    "password": "<password>"
}
```

You will obtain a json response containing a **[jwt](https://jwt.io)** and a refresh token.

The jwt will expire after a week, and the refresh token after a month.


You can get a new jwt posting your refresh token at the following endpoint :  
[POST] **https://api.notif.immo/auth/token/refresh**

    {
        refresh_token: '<refresh_token_here>'
    }

 ## Public routes
        All routes prefixed by `/public/` don\'t need a JWT to be called
 ## Count query
        If you want to perform a count query, without having the collection results in the response, you can set `itemsPerPage=0` as a query parameter:  
        https://api.notif.immo/documents/properties?propertyTypes[]=1&includedDepartments[]=/departments/77&surfaceMin=10&surfaceMax=200&itemsPerPage=0  
        
Please note that count is limited to *10 000 results* for `/documents/properties` requests.
 ## Date - Timezone
        The timezone is set to Europe/Paris.

get.summary: Resolve property address from multiple sources
get.description: Attempts to find the most accurate address for a property using multiple data sources: reverseGeocoding (GPS coordinates with max precision), adAddressField (address from ads), and DPE (ADEME energy data with construction filtering, ±10% surface range, neighboring cities fallback, and requires both energy and gas labels).

parameters.name: uuid
parameters.description: UUID of the property to resolve address for

200.description:
Your server implementation should return this HTTP status code if the data was received successfully. If a webhook fails, Melo attempts to deliver your webhooks up to five times. Every retry will take place 1 hour after the previous one.  

Restricting your webhook to our IPs addresses is highly recommended for security reasons:
- Staging:
    - 178.238.226.136
- Production:
    - 144.76.91.183

200.description:
Your server implementation should return this HTTP status code if the data was received successfully. If a webhook fails, Melo attempts to deliver your webhooks up to five times. Every retry will take place 1 hour after the previous one.  

Restricting your webhook to our IPs addresses is highly recommended for security reasons:
- Staging:
    - 178.238.226.136
- Production:
    - 144.76.91.183

average.summary: The average price per square meter.
average.description: This value represents the mean price calculated across all relevant properties.

average_max.summary: The upper average (or high average) price per square meter.
average_max.description: Calculated as the mean of the average price and the highest price, providing an indication of the upper-end price tendencies in the data.

average_min.summary: The lower average (or low average) price per square meter.
average_min.description: Calculated as the mean of the average price and the lowest price, giving an insight into the lower-end price tendencies in the data.

median.summary: The median price per square meter.
median.description: This value represents the middle value in the distribution of prices per square meter, ensuring that half the values are above this point and half are below.

renterFees.description: Agency fees. Only applicable to rentals.
